# Orivan

> Orivan is an editorial discovery platform built around curated journeys of
> founders, scientists, designers, athletes, writers, and artists. Each
> journey traces the real path: early decisions, failures, lessons, and the
> work that followed.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Featured journeys, collections, community stories, and categories.
- [Collections](/collections): Editorial groupings of journeys by theme.
- [Paths](/paths): Curated step-by-step learning routes through related journeys.
- [Community Stories](/stories): First-person stories from builders, makers, and operators.
- [Search](/search): Full-text search across people, collections, stories, and videos.

## Optional

- [Submit a story](/stories/new): Form to draft a new community story (local-only in MVP).
